topPriority.issue: Cross-reference candidates have persistently low signal confidence

strategies.detectedIssue: Cross-reference candidates have persistently low signal confidence
strategies.rootCause: Cross-reference scoring relies on signals (ISO code, family, operations, materials) whose individual reliability is too low to produce confident matches without multiple corroborating signals.

recommendedActions.description: Flag all cross-reference candidates with low signal confidence as diagnostic-only — exclude from public equivalents listings.
Reduce the confidence weight of isoProductCode signal from 20 to recommended 8 as per calibration analysis.
Route all exact_equivalent cross-references through human review before promotion.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Reduces false-positive equivalent promotions by ~60%. Lowers cross-reference instability cluster from critical to watch.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Unvalidated cross-references may surface incorrect equivalents to end-users, eroding trust.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate for suppression; 1–2 cycles for weight adjustment to propagate.

isolationActions: Keep unstable candidates in diagnostic-only mode
Do not write to exactEquivalents or functionalAlternatives
containment.rollbackPlan: Restore previous confidence weights from calibration snapshot; re-enable suppressed candidates after review.

strategies.detectedIssue: Incomplete catalog data causes severe pipeline degradation under stress
strategies.rootCause: When a PDF source contains partial catalog data (missing pages, truncated tables), the pipeline processes whatever is extractable but produces products with critical field gaps that cascade into enrichment and cross-ref failures.

recommendedActions.description: Quarantine products originating from sources flagged as incomplete. Prevent them from entering enrichment or cross-reference until source is verified.
Queue the incomplete source PDFs for manual review to determine if re-parsing with adjusted parameters can recover missing data.
All products from incomplete sources must pass manual validation before any downstream processing.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Prevents 76% average degradation from incomplete sources. Protects downstream pipeline integrity.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Incomplete data contaminates enrichment and cross-reference results for all products in the same batch.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate quarantine; source review 1–3 days depending on volume.

containment.scope: All products originating from incomplete catalog sources
isolationActions: Block incomplete-source products at ingestion gate
Add source completeness check to parse stage
containment.rollbackPlan: Release quarantined products after source verification confirms data completeness.

strategies.rootCause: The cross-reference scoring engine produces candidates whose reliability cannot be verified through automated signals alone. Too many candidates rely on single-dimension matches.

recommendedActions.description: Suppress all cross-reference candidates below score 70 from public output. Keep as diagnostic data.
Route all exact_equivalent and near_equivalent candidates through manual review queue.
Reduce the weight of isoProductCode and single-signal matches in cross-reference scoring.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Moves cross-reference instability from "critical" toward "watch" tier. Prevents ~40% of speculative candidates from reaching users.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: End-users see cross-brand equivalents that may differ in critical properties (coating, chipbreaker zone, material suitability).
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate for suppression; 1 cycle for weight adjustment.

isolationActions: Enable review-gate on all candidate promotions
Lock autoPromoteUnstableCandidates = false
containment.rollbackPlan: Re-enable candidates and adjust thresholds after review coverage reaches 80%.

strategies.detectedIssue: Recurring coating alias conflicts between brands or catalog versions
strategies.rootCause: Different brands or catalog editions use the same raw coating name for different actual coatings (e.g. "TiAlN" may be PVD multi-layer for one brand and a CVD variant for another).

recommendedActions.description: Re-run enrichment pipeline with updated COATING_ALIASES table to resolve ambiguous raw coating names.
Quarantine products with unresolved coating conflicts into a review-pending state.
For PDF-sourced products with coating conflicts, queue source pages for manual coating verification.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Resolves coating-based false equivalences. Estimated +6 to cross-reference trust score.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Cross-reference engine may pair inserts with fundamentally different coating technologies.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: 1 pipeline cycle for enrichment rerun; manual review timeline depends on volume.

containment.scope: Products with raw coating values not in COATING_ALIASES
isolationActions: Mark coating field as "unresolved" on affected products
Exclude from cross-ref scoring on coating dimension
containment.rollbackPlan: Restore original coating values from rawParsed.coatingRaw audit trail.

strategies.detectedIssue: Malformed PDF sources produce unreliable extraction under stress
strategies.rootCause: PDFs with encoding issues, missing fonts, or corrupted text layers cause the text extractor to produce garbled output, leading to OCR-like digit/letter substitution errors and truncated ISO codes.

recommendedActions.description: Route malformed PDFs to OCR review pipeline. Flag extracted text as low-reliability until reviewed.
Quarantine all products extracted from malformed sources. Mark with "malformed_source" flag.
Exclude malformed-source products from cross-reference candidate generation.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Prevents 58% average degradation from malformed sources. Eliminates OCR-induced false cross-references.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Garbled ISO codes create false cross-reference matches; digit substitutions (0↔O, 1↔I) produce plausible but wrong product identifiers.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate quarantine; OCR review 2–5 days depending on PDF quality.

containment.scope: Products extracted from PDFs flagged as malformed
isolationActions: Block at ingestion with malformed_source flag
Require OCR verification before re-ingestion
containment.rollbackPlan: Re-parse PDFs with alternative text extractor or manual OCR; release quarantine after verification.

strategies.rootCause: Coating alias conflicts and duplicate series create validation ambiguities that the automated pipeline cannot resolve.

recommendedActions.description: Isolate products involved in validation conflicts. Group by conflict type for batch review.
Route all conflicting products to human reviewers with conflict details highlighted.
After coating alias table is expanded, re-enrich conflicting products to attempt automated resolution.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Resolves validation ambiguities for affected products. Reduces validation weakness score by estimated 30–50 points.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Conflicting products remain in production with ambiguous coating/grade data.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Enrichment rerun: 1 cycle. Manual review: 1–5 days depending on conflict count.

isolationActions: Mark as "conflict_pending" in product database
Exclude from cross-reference candidate generation
containment.rollbackPlan: Restore pre-conflict product data from enrichment audit trail.

strategies.detectedIssue: OCR digit/letter substitution errors detected in 1 product(s)

evidence.parserFailureSummary: Parser failures are dominated by malformed ISO shape, OCR-like digit/letter substitution, and truncated code evidence before normalization has enough signal. Top signature: parser:missing_iso_code (1).

strategies.rootCause: OCR or poor PDF text extraction introduces character substitutions (0↔O, 1↔I, 5↔S) in ISO product codes, creating syntactically valid but semantically wrong identifiers.

recommendedActions.description: Flag products with OCR substitution signatures for manual code verification against original source.
Exclude OCR-affected products from cross-reference candidate generation until codes are verified.
Quarantine products with confirmed OCR substitution patterns. Add "ocr_unverified" flag.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Eliminates OCR-induced false cross-references. Prevents wrong-product recommendations.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: A substituted ISO code (e.g. CNMG12O408 instead of CNMG120408) creates a phantom product that cross-references against real products.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Quarantine: immediate. Manual verification: 0.5–1 day per affected batch.

containment.scope: Products with OCR substitution failure signatures
isolationActions: Add "ocr_unverified" flag to affected products
Block from enrichment and cross-reference
containment.rollbackPlan: Remove flag and re-process after manual code verification.

strategies.detectedIssue: High rejection rate: 78% of ingested products rejected (7/9)
strategies.rootCause: Source PDFs may contain non-product data, or parser/normaliser rules are too aggressive in creating product records from ambiguous input.

recommendedActions.description: Identify source PDFs that produce the highest rejection rates and quarantine for review.
Review rejected sources to determine if parser improvements or OCR can reduce rejection rates.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Reduce wasted processing on non-viable sources. Focus ingestion on high-yield catalogs.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Pipeline processing time wasted on sources that consistently produce rejected products.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Source analysis: 1 day. Parser adjustment: 1–2 cycles.

isolationActions: Add source-level rejection tracking
Auto-skip sources with > 3 consecutive full rejections
containment.rollbackPlan: Re-enable sources after parser improvements reduce rejection rate below 20%.

strategies.detectedIssue: Cross-references match on ISO shape but lack sufficient corroborating evidence
strategies.rootCause: ISO shape code alone is not a strong discriminator — many inserts share the same shape prefix. Without matching coating, chipbreaker, or grade data, these candidates are speculative.

recommendedActions.description: Keep shape-only matches as diagnostic candidates. Do not promote to near_equivalent or higher.
Present shape-plausible candidates in a review queue with highlighted missing fields.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Prevents speculative matches from reaching end-users. Reduces cross-ref instability score by ~15 points.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Users see low-quality alternatives that differ in critical dimensions (coating, chipbreaker zone).
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate suppression; review completion depends on volume.

isolationActions: Cap shape-only candidates at economy_alternative tier maximum
containment.rollbackPlan: Remove cap after corroborating evidence is added per candidate.

strategies.detectedIssue: Products persist with low source evidence despite passing confidence thresholds
strategies.rootCause: Confidence scoring boosts from secondary signals (keywords, tags) can compensate for missing primary evidence (grade, dimensions), producing high-confidence products built on weak foundations.

recommendedActions.description: Reduce boost weights for secondary signals (keywords, tags) relative to primary evidence (grade, dimensions, coating).
Route products with < 3 primary signals confirmed to manual review queue.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Better calibrated confidence scores. Products with thin evidence score 10–20 points lower, correctly reflecting uncertainty.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Overconfident products enter cross-reference and recommendation engines with unreliable data.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: Immediate after calibration weight update; 1 cycle to propagate.

containment.scope: Products with fewer than 3 primary evidence signals
isolationActions: Add "low_source_evidence" flag to affected products
Exclude from high-confidence recommendation paths
containment.rollbackPlan: Revert confidence weights to previous calibration profile.

strategies.detectedIssue: 3 PDF source(s) failed text extraction and are pending OCR review

sources.reason: Text extraction failed: Text assembly failed: URI malformed
Text extraction failed: Text assembly failed: URI malformed
Text extraction failed: Text assembly failed: URI malformed

strategies.rootCause: PDF text extraction fails for documents with embedded images, non-standard fonts, or corrupted text layers. These sources cannot be processed without OCR.

recommendedActions.description: Queue all OCR candidate PDFs for manual review. Determine if OCR-based extraction is viable or if the source should be rejected.
Ensure no products from failed-extraction sources remain in the product database.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Resolves 3 blocked source(s). Potential to add products from previously inaccessible catalogs.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Valuable product data remains locked in unprocessed PDFs. Catalog coverage gaps persist.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: OCR review: 1–3 days per PDF depending on quality and page count.

containment.scope: Source PDFs that failed text extraction
isolationActions: Keep in ocrCandidates queue — do not retry automatically
Log extraction failure reason for diagnostic use
containment.rollbackPlan: Remove from OCR queue if source is determined to be unusable.

strategies.detectedIssue: Validation coverage at 0% with 2 products pending review
strategies.rootCause: Product ingestion rate exceeds manual review capacity. New products enter the database without human verification.

recommendedActions.description: Prioritise high-confidence products for fast-track review. Queue low-confidence products for detailed review.
Suppress cross-reference output for unreviewed products. Only surface candidates between reviewed products.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Focuses review effort on highest-value products. Prevents unreviewed products from generating untrusted recommendations.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Unreviewed products accumulate, reducing overall data quality confidence. End-users interact with unverified data.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: At current rate, backlog clearance requires reviewing 2 products. Estimated 2–5 days with prioritised review.

containment.scope: All unreviewed products in the database
isolationActions: Tag unreviewed products as "pending_review"
Limit to diagnostic-only in cross-reference
containment.rollbackPlan: Remove review requirement after coverage reaches 80%.

strategies.detectedIssue: Normalizer consistently fails to populate core fields for certain product patterns
strategies.rootCause: Source PDFs or catalog formats for certain brands lack structured data for one or more core fields (e.g. chipbreaker, geometry orientation), and the normalizer has no heuristic to infer them.

recommendedActions.description: Re-enrich affected products after adding brand-specific fallback heuristics to the normalizer.
Tag products with missing core fields so downstream engines can weight them lower.

estimatedImpact.expectedImprovement: Increases field coverage by estimated 10–15% for affected brands. Improves cross-ref scoring accuracy.
estimatedImpact.riskOfInaction: Cross-reference and enrichment produce less reliable output for these products, but risk is contained by confidence scoring.
estimatedImpact.recoveryTimeEstimate: 1–2 development cycles to add heuristics; 1 pipeline cycle to re-enrich.

containment.scope: Products from brands with known field extraction gaps
isolationActions: Flag products missing ≥2 core fields
containment.rollbackPlan: Remove flags and re-enrich from raw parsed data.
